original_image_tags: Aged, light-blue or greenish government form paper with three hole-punch marks on the left margin. Top center stamped "SECRET" in large, red ink with a horizontal line struck through the middle of the word.

elements.description: A scanned document page containing typed text, a stamped 'SECRET' classification mark, handwritten notes, and a date stamp '4 - JUN 1948'. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no actual images (photographs, sketches, etc.), only typed text and a stamped 'SECRET' classification mark.
